query:
-- Refresh supplier_registry totals for all providers
UPDATE supplier_registry sr
JOIN (
  SELECT provider, COUNT(*) AS totalServices, COALESCE(SUM(monthlyCost), 0) AS totalCost
  FROM services
  WHERE billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived'
  GROUP BY provider
) AS t ON sr.name = t.provider
SET sr.totalServices = t.totalServices, sr.totalMonthlyCost = t.totalCost, sr.updatedAt = NOW();

-- Check final dashboard stats
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'unmatched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'flagged' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flagged
FROM services
WHERE billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived';
